title: cyclophyllum guillauminianum
intro: Cyclophyllum guillauminianum, a plant species native to New Caledonia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. In some herbal preparations, the plant is used to make teas or infusions that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
